ai_maturity_reasoning: ai_adjacent_open_roles: Two Data Platform Engineer roles and one ML Engineer role open on BuiltIn. 3 of 11 total engineering openings are AI-adjacent (27%).
named_ai_ml_leadership: No public Head of AI, VP Data, or Chief Scientist on the team page. CTO holds a combined infrastructure-and-data remit.
executive_commentary: CEO blog post Feb 2026 mentions 'AI-powered insights' as a 2026 priority. No keynote or podcast appearances on AI strategy in the last 12 months.
modern_data_ml_stack: BuiltWith reports dbt and Snowflake in use. No Databricks, no Weights and Biases, no vLLM. Stack is modern-data but not ML-platform-modern.
github_org_activity: Public GitHub org has 4 repos, all non-AI (developer tooling). Absence of AI repos is not proof of absence — AI work may be in private repos.
fields.job_post_signal: 11 open roles today vs 4 sixty days ago (doubled).
fields.layoff_signal: no layoffs.csv match found for Orrin Labs Inc.
fields.leadership_change_signal: No public leadership change detected in the seeded prospect profile.
fields.bench_match_summary: Bench match from attached materials: python: 7 available; data: 9 available.
fields.competitor_gap_position: The prospect matches the sample's AI-augmented BI profile and sits below the top-quartile benchmark.
fields.recommended_hook: Lead with the dedicated AI leadership gap (high confidence, two strong peer examples). Frame as a question — 'is the AI leadership role still being scoped, or is it deliberately distributed across the CTO remit?' — not an assertion of a gap. Avoid the MLOps gap in the first email; it is medium confidence and the prospect may have the function inside their Data Platform Engineer JD.
